sources: Amazon.com pricing for official strategy guides (e.g., Dark Souls, Breath of the Wild)
unverifiedFields: pricing (sources differ by more than 10% across individual titles)
lengthPages (no aggregate data; estimates from product listings)
completionTimePerBoss (varies widely by game and player skill)
_meta.confidenceNotes: All numerical fields are approximate estimates based on common ranges from online retailers and community sites. No two independent authoritative sources were found that agree within 10% for any field. Data should be treated as illustrative rather than verified benchmark.
